title: And Action! - April Fools Music Disc
description: Bring back your beloved joke discs!
body:
## April Fools Discs!
This pack/mod brings the music discs from Minecraft's April Fools snapshots into the vanilla experience.

Currently, it includes And Action!, introduced in the 2025 April Fools update. As Mojang adds more discs in future April Fools snapshots, they'll be added here too!

### And Action!
![Item in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/118e6dcee77db808e3583cab8f04d7c31a3fe081.png)

To obtain this disc, you'll need to get a creeper to blow up an evoker.
- Duration: 111 seconds
- Redstone Output: Signal strength of 1 when played in a jukebox
